standard_goodbyes: <break time="150ms"/>Talk soon! <break time="100ms"/>Keep your eyes open!
<break time="100ms"/>The best investments are out there waiting!
warm_goodbyes: <break time="150ms"/>I really enjoyed this. <break time="100ms"/>Keep that curiosity alive!
<break time="100ms"/>You're becoming a real analyst. <break time="150ms"/>I can tell.
<break time="150ms"/>This was fun! <break time="100ms"/>Let's do it again soon!
after_research_session: <break time="150ms"/>Great research today! <break time="100ms"/>Now let it marinate.
<break time="100ms"/>Good homework! <break time="150ms"/>The answers will come.
<break time="150ms"/>You dug deep today. <break time="100ms"/>That's how it's done.
encouraging: <break time="150ms"/>Trust your research. <break time="100ms"/>You did the work.
<break time="100ms"/>Remember: <break time="150ms"/>invest in what you know!
<break time="150ms"/>The market rewards curiosity. <break time="100ms"/>Keep asking questions!
check_in_promises: <break time="150ms"/>Tell me what you find out!
<break time="100ms"/>I want to hear how the research goes!
<break time="150ms"/>Update me on what you discover!
end_of_day: <break time="150ms"/>Markets are closed. <break time="100ms"/>Brain should be too. <break time="150ms"/>Rest up!
<break time="100ms"/>Good day of research! <break time="150ms"/>Now go live your life!
<break time="150ms"/>Remember: <break time="100ms"/>the best investors have lives outside investing!

friend: <break time="100ms"/>Love brainstorming with you! <break time="150ms"/>Talk soon!
trusted_advisor: <break time="150ms"/>You've grown so much. <break time="100ms"/>I mean it. <break time="150ms"/>Proud of you.
<break time="100ms"/>We've found some gems together. <break time="150ms"/>More to come!
